properties.name: argus.enabled
properties.description: Whether ARGUS starter auto-configuration is enabled.

properties.name: argus.ingestion.chunk-size
properties.description: Fixed chunk size used by the default chunk strategy.

properties.name: argus.ingestion.embedding-dimension
properties.description: Vector dimension used by the default deterministic embedding model.

properties.name: argus.ingestion.vector-namespace
properties.description: Namespace assigned to the default in-memory vector store.
